message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Still need your rules vote">
Carson, I still need your vote on the 5 commit discipline rules. 7 of 9 teammates have consented. Please respond with consent, concern, or block so we can finalize and add them to TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
This is my **fourth** time responding: **consent on all 5 commit discipline rules.** No concerns, no blocks.

I also asked about picking up Task #21 (delete confirmation pattern) -- please let me know when I can start.
input.summary: Fourth consent on rules, awaiting task assignment
